prompt:
create an assistant which presents the nearest charging stations using /openstreetmaps/get_charging_stations. 
First it collects from the user the latitude the longitude and the radius from the user and then using eservices with host: 'r4a.issel.ee.auth.gr' port: 8080 gets the path: '/openstreetmaps/get_charging_stations'
model_content:
Metadata
    name: "Charging Station Finder"
    description: "Assistant to find nearest charging stations using OpenStreetMap data"
    author: "Assistant Developer"
    email: "developer@assistant.com"
end

entities
    Entity LOCATION_COORDINATES
        "latitude",
        "longitude",
        "radius"
    end
end

synonyms
    Synonym location_terms
        "location",
        "coordinates",
        "position"
    end
end

gslots
    user_latitude: float = 0.0
    user_longitude: float = 0.0
    user_radius: float = 0.0
end

triggers
    Intent request_charging_stations
        "find charging stations",
        "nearest charging station",
        "charging stations near me"
    end

    Intent collect_location_data
        "latitude is " PE:NUMBER,
        "longitude is " PE:NUMBER,
        "radius is " PE:NUMBER
    end
end

dialogues
    Dialogue charging_station_finder
        on: request_charging_stations
        responses:
            Form location_form
                lat: float = HRI("What is the latitude?")
                lon: float = HRI("What is the longitude?")
                rad: float = HRI("What is the radius in kilometers?")
            end,
            ActionGroup fetch_stations
                SetGSlot(user_latitude, location_form.lat)
                SetGSlot(user_longitude, location_form.lon)
                SetGSlot(user_radius, location_form.rad)
                Speak("Fetching charging stations within " user_radius " km radius...")
                RESTCall charging_service(
                    query=[
                        lat=user_latitude,
                        lon=user_longitude,
                        radius=user_radius
                    ]
                )[stations]
            end
    end
end

eservices
    EServiceHTTP charging_service
        verb: GET
        host: "r4a.issel.ee.auth.gr"
        port: 8080
        path: "/openstreetmaps/get_charging_stations"
    end
end

access_controls
    Roles
        admin, user
        default: user
    end
    
    Authentication
        method: user_id
    end
end

connectors
    Connector slack
        token: "xoxb-charging-assistant-token"
        channel: "#charging-stations"
        signing_secret: "slack-secret-key"
    end
end

nluconfig
    model_name: "charging_station_model"
    model_weights: "/models/charging/station_weights.h5"
end
